AssociateLibraryItemReview.description: Grants permission to associate a library item review in the Q Business application environment

AssociateQAppWithUser.description: Grants permission to associate Q App with a user in the Q Business application environment

BatchCreateCategory.description: Grants permission to create the categories of a library in the Q Business application environment

BatchDeleteCategory.description: Grants permission to delete the categories of a library in the Q Business application environment

BatchUpdateCategory.description: Grants permission to update the categories of a library in the Q Business application environment

CopyQApp.description: Grants permission to copy Q App in the Q Business application environment

CreateLibraryItem.description: Grants permission to create a library item in the Q Business application environment

CreateLibraryItemReview.description: Grants permission to create a library item review in the Q Business application environment

CreateQApp.description: Grants permission to create Q App in the Q Business application environment

CreateSubscriptionToken.description: Grants permission to subscribe to a Q App event bus topic in the Q Business application environment

DeleteLibraryItem.description: Grants permission to delete a library item in the Q Business application environment

DeleteQApp.description: Grants permission to delete Q App in the Q Business application environment

DescribeQAppPermissions.description: Grants permission to get Q App sharing permissions in the Q Business application environment

DisassociateLibraryItemReview.description: Grants permission to disassociate a library item review in the Q Business application environment

DisassociateQAppFromUser.description: Grants permission to disassociate Q App with a user in the Q Business application environment

ExportQAppSessionData.description: Grants permission to export Q App session data in the Q Business application environment

GetLibraryItem.description: Grants permission to get a library item in the Q Business application environment

GetQApp.description: Grants permission to get Q App in the Q Business application environment

GetQAppSession.description: Grants permission to get Q App session in the Q Business application environment

GetQAppSessionMetadata.description: Grants permission to get Q App session metadata in the Q Business application environment

ImportDocument.description: Grants permission to import a document to Q App or Q App Session in the Q Business application environment

ListCategories.description: Grants permission to list categories in the Q Business application environment

ListLibraryItems.description: Grants permission to list library items in the Q Business application environment

ListQAppSessionData.description: Grants permission to get Q App session data in the Q Business application environment

ListQApps.description: Grants permission to list Q Apps in the Q Business application environment

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

PredictProblemStatementFromConversation.description: Grants permission to predict problem statement from conversation log in the Q Business application environment

PredictQApp.description: Grants permission to predict Q App from conversation log or problem statement in the Q Business application environment

PredictQAppFromProblemStatement.description: Grants permission to predict Q App metadata from problem statement in the Q Business application environment

StartQAppSession.description: Grants permission to start Q App session in the Q Business application environment

StopQAppSession.description: Grants permission to stop Q App session in the Q Business application environment

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource with given key value pairs

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove the tag with the given key from a resource

UpdateLibraryItem.description: Grants permission to update a library item in the Q Business application environment

UpdateLibraryItemMetadata.description: Grants permission to update the metadata of a library item in the Q Business application environment

UpdateQApp.description: Grants permission to update Q App in the Q Business application environment

UpdateQAppPermissions.description: Grants permission to update Q App sharing permissions in the Q Business application environment

UpdateQAppSession.description: Grants permission to update Q App session in the Q Business application environment

UpdateQAppSessionMetadata.description: Grants permission to update Q App session metadata in the Q Business application environment

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

qapps:AppIsPublished.description: Filters access by whether Q App is published

qapps:SessionIsShared.description: Filters access by whether Q App Session is shared

qapps:UserIsAppOwner.description: Filters access by whether requester is Q App owner

qapps:UserIsSessionModerator.description: Filters access by whether requester is Q App Session moderator
